old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.6","title":"Forward Non-Storing DAOs end to end","description":"Correct Rust node Non-Storing DAO handling: originators address DAOs to the DODAG root and select a parent as next hop; intermediate nodes IP-forward without consuming or rewriting the original IPv6 source; root validates authenticated provenance without equating origin source to immediate L2 forwarder; avoid accepting spoofed target/replay mutations.","acceptance_criteria":"A three-node literal topology proves a leaf DAO crosses an intermediate parent and is accepted at root with original source preserved; spoofed target/provenance fails before mutation; intermediate node does not consume DAO; link-local single-hop rules remain enforced; node/RPL tests and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:32.033423Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:32.033423Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:32.156998Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.6","title":"Forward Non-Storing DAOs end to end","description":"Correct Rust node Non-Storing DAO handling: originators address DAOs to the DODAG root and select a parent as next hop; intermediate nodes IP-forward without consuming or rewriting the original IPv6 source; root validates authenticated provenance without equating origin source to immediate L2 forwarder; avoid accepting spoofed target/replay mutations.","acceptance_criteria":"A three-node literal topology proves a leaf DAO crosses an intermediate parent and is accepted at root with original source preserved; spoofed target/provenance fails before mutation; intermediate node does not consume DAO; link-local single-hop rules remain enforced; node/RPL tests and three reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:32.033423Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:38.809827Z","started_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:38.809827Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-17T22:02:38.809827Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:38.809827Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:57:32.156998Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.6","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-19T23:39:10.303354Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Completed in /Volumes/Attic/Opencode/opencode/lichen-rust-rpl on integration/rust-rpl-recovery. Added literal root-parent-leaf signed DAO test proving original ULA source and signed DAO bytes survive relay, intermediate does not consume, root rejects bad provenance and unauthorized target before mutation, and root installs [parent, leaf]. Fixed authenticated IID comparison and Stack IID-to-EUI representation so key-derived DAO origins can pass direct-hop authentication. Preserved link-local multi-hop rejection. Final: lichen-node 160 unit + 1 DAO vector + 1 doc pass (1 doc ignored); production lib clippy with --no-deps passes; git diff --check passes; three focused reviews pass. Full dependency clippy remains blocked by pre-existing lichen-schc manual_find/too_many_arguments lints and all-target by scheduler::last_data."}
Implemented and validated authenticated end-to-end Non-Storing DAO forwarding

comment: Independent review found authenticated DAO handling is not wired into the normal Stack receive path and validation can be bypassed via split public APIs

new_value: Fixed Non-Storing DAO IP-forwarding without consumption on intermediates, root provenance validation independent of L2 forwarder, 6LoRH downward and border router routes. Updated rpl mesh_formation test for 3-node literal topology, hetero sim, Python type aliases. west build, cargo test -p lichen-rpl, pytest rpl, clippy, ruff all pass. Verified with simulation.
